SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data=$raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $wsPath=if($data.cwd){$data.cwd}else{$PWD.Path}; $logDir=Join-Path $wsPath 'logs/copilot'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir -Force | Out-Null; $entry=[ordered]@{timestamp=(Get-Date).ToString('o'); event='session_start'; cwd=$wsPath}; $entry | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Add-Content -Path (Join-Path $logDir 'session.log'); Write-Host '[session-logger-lite] session start logged.'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data=$raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $wsPath=if($data.cwd){$data.cwd}else{$PWD.Path}; $logDir=Join-Path $wsPath 'logs/copilot'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir -Force | Out-Null; $entry=[ordered]@{timestamp=(Get-Date).ToString('o'); event='session_end'}; $entry | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Add-Content -Path (Join-Path $logDir 'session.log'); Write-Host '[session-logger-lite] session end logged.'"
